channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytip, 9th May
item.description:
30-90 bath Close. Please clear flytip

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61-113, Bath Close, Peckham, Greater London

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61-113, Bath Close, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Hole in the pavement - could be dangerous, 9th May
item.description:
There is a hole that is getting bigger in the pavement outside our house. It could be very dangerous if anything got caught in it, particularly as it is getting bigger.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Winterbrook Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tents and Trolleys within woods, 9th May
item.description:
As per others reports. Within the woods as well as outside them. Many thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkfield Way, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 9th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bath Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Container infront of the Dover House, 9th May
item.description:
Since the containers are placed infront of the Dover House, it became a constant place for dumping large rubbish. It is creating an awful sight which we didn't had before containers were brought.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maple Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 9th May
item.description:
Please remove graffiti from cable box in alleyway to side of Brimtonroy Tenanrs and residents association hall

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Culmore Road, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: High level of large items, 9th May
item.description:
This a continuous problem in this block on level 1. The resident do not put the rubbish down the chute and put large items around their. This old carpet came from Flat 205 Cross Court. They are regular throwing large items around there. It’s getting beyond a joke. This level of rubbish will attract rats or cause potential fire hazards.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Titmuss Avenue, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bed base, 9th May
item.description:
Bed base & sheets of wood dumped on the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hartville Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clifton Crescent, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Car has been parked here for at least the last month, 9th May
item.description:
Looks like the car has been dumped here. Windows are slightly open

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Regent Square, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken equipment and uneven floor, 9th May
item.description:
The climbing frame is dangerous as one of the climbing aids is has broken off. This is not a new issue and I witnessed a child fall due to having nothing to hold on to. Also, the big climbing frame is broken with hazard tape that’s now on the floor. The soft ground is badly damaged and presents as a trip issue.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Park, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By tree outside 66 Salusbury Rd, 9th May
item.description:
Someone has dumped a jacket by the tree
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salusbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old FRIDGE - dumped opposite Ayres Court, 9th May
item.description:
There’s an old fridge dumped on the pavement opposite Ayres Court - SE5 7FS

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 42, Southampton Way, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
